arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle v Liverpool: FA Cup – live
arts.sum: Updates from 3pm (GMT) kickoff at Home Park Get in touch: you can email Michael about the game "As a Liverpool fan, I’m thinking that starting eleven better get the job done, because that bench is about as thin as I’ve ever seen,” emails Joe Pearson. Yes, I’m not sure Slot is going to turn to his young guns in the unlikely event that things do go south for Liverpool. Curtis Jones and Darwin Nunez will surely be called upon, but I would expect to see a few debuts if the away side pull away. Continue reading...
